name: Overwatch
description: An international task force formed to maintain global peace and security.

name: Talon
description: A covert organization seeking to reshape the world through conflict.

name: Junkers
description: A group of scavengers and fighters based in Junkertown, Australia.

name: Yokai
description: A Japanese vigilante group protecting Kanezaka and its people.

name: Null Sector
description: An extremist omnic group fighting for omnic supremacy.

name: Shambali
description: A peaceful order of omnics devoted to spiritual growth and harmony.

name: The Collective
description: A scientific community focused on biolight technology and innovation.

name: Wayfinder Society
description: Explorers dedicated to uncovering ancient civilizations and knowledge.

name: Phreaks
description: A rebellious underground group known for chaos and disruption.

name: Inti Warriors
description: A warrior order inspired by Incan traditions and solar power.

name: Ironclad Guild
description: A guild of master engineers specializing in weapons and armor.

name: Vishkar Corporation
description: A powerful corporation specializing in hard-light technology and urban development.

name: Bounty Hunters
description: Independent mercenaries who track and capture targets for profit.

name: Deadlock Rebels
description: An outlaw gang known for heists and rebellion against authority.
